This property makes it particularly useful for cooling objects and maintaining body temperature.

Water also has a high specific volume (about 0.62 kg/m³), which means it occupies more space than air at the same pressure. This characteristic allows water to be used as a coolant in engines and other applications where space efficiency is important.

In summary, water
